title: Top row complete: W O Q P
description: Finish the top row with the weaker fingers: ring (W O) and pinky (Q P)

tips.text: Now the weaker fingers finish the top row: ring (W, O), pinky (Q, P)
P is a pinky stretch — careful and deliberate
